behavior_summary: MORELAVA::gotHit handles the object's 'got hit' event by recording a value into an info slot (0x20C) on a referenced target and then marking/excluding that target from further processing.

The handler appears to accept two incoming parameters; one is used as the dword value written into info 0x20C (inferred to be damage or hit magnitude), and the other is likely an identifier/source (attacker/process) though its use is not explicit in the snippet.
No global flags are read or written by this handler; its effects are local to the target/process context that receives the info write and exclusion.
notable_control_flow: Sequence: push infoId (0x20C) -> push dword [BP+06] (incoming value) -> push target reference (push indirect 02 bytes) -> call set info -> call process exclude -> return.
There are no conditionals or loops observed; control flow is linear and ends with a return after exclusion.
open_questions: What is the semantic meaning of info id 0x20C (exact game-level meaning of the stored value)?
What precisely is the 'target' referenced by the indirect 02-byte push (the object being annotated/excluded)?
What are the exact roles and sizes of the two formal parameters (which one is attacker id vs damage/value)?

main_function.name: U8P_MORELAVA::gotHit
main_function.purpose: On receiving a 'got hit' event, store a provided value into info slot 0x20C for a target object and then exclude that target from further processing to prevent reprocessing or re-triggering.
entry_conditions: Event 6 (U8P_MORELAVA::gotHit) — triggered when the MoreLava object is struck or would register a hit

function_map.name: U8P_MORELAVA::gotHit
function_map.role: Event handler that records hit info and excludes the affected process/target

function_map.name: U8P_MORELAVA::set info
function_map.role: Engine routine to write a numeric value into an object/process info slot (here used for info id 0x20C)

function_map.name: U8P_MORELAVA::process exclude
function_map.role: Engine routine to mark/exclude a process/object from further processing or consideration

external_calls.purpose: Write the incoming value (dword at BP+06) into the target's info slot 0x20C, associating the hit value with the referenced object/process.
Exclude or mark the (same) target/process from further processing after the info write; likely prevents duplicated handling or further AI processing for that target.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: MORELAVA::gotHit handles the object's 'got hit' event by recording a value into an info slot (0x20C) on a referenced target and then marking/excluding that target from further processing.
